senses.gloss: sinful, unrighteous (describes one who is excessively sinful)

examples.text: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
examples.english: None would deny it except every evildoing transgressor.

etymology.text: فَعِيل (faʕīl)-type stative-verb derived from the active participle from the verb أَثِمَ (ʔaṯima, “to sin”).
